title: Spearsmp
description: This plugin upgrade the member spears each time he get a kill , at the netherite spear you get speed 2 and strength 2 and the only persone with 10kills more than the netherite spear get the god spear
body:
## 🔱 SpearSMP : The Ultimate Progression-Based PvP System
SpearSMP  introduces a high-stakes, evolving combat mechanic to your Minecraft server. Every player receives a unique spear that grows in power with every kill, turning your world into a true competitive arena.

## ⚔️ Evolution Mechanics
Kill players to upgrade your spear through multiple tiers. The more kills you get, the more
god-like you become.

**Netherite Tier:** Grants Speed II and Strength II.

**GOD TIER:** The pinnacle of power. Reach 10 Netherite kills to unlock Speed III, Strength
           III, and Fire Resistance.
           
**Unique Status:** Only one God Spear can exist at a time. Will you be the one to hold it?

## ⚠️ High Stakes & Fair Play
 Death Penalty: If you die, you lose your progression and return to the lowest tier. High reward requires high risk.

Anti-Abuse System: Players cannot farm the same opponent repeatedly to prevent unfair leveling.

Uncraftable: Spears cannot be crafted or duplicated, making every single one a precious asset.

## 🛠️ Commands
/spearsmp getspear : Recover your spear based on your current tier if lost.

/spearsmp top : show the players with the best spears.

/spearsmp give <player> <tiers> upgrade or downgrade a player spear to the tier you want
